ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "slot_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "rtp" REAL /* Return to player percentage */,
  "variance" TEXT /* Variance level of the game */,
  "max_win" TEXT /* Maximum win potential */,
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game type */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Current status of the game (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "min_bet" REAL /* Minimum bet amount for the game */,
  "max_bet" REAL /* Maximum bet amount for the game */,
  "jackpot" TEXT /* Information about the game's jackpot */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the game's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_type_id") REFERENCES game_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon or image representing the game type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the game type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the developer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the developer's website */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the developer is active */,
  "last_contacted" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last contact with the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_developer_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_developer_mapping_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth for age verification */,
  "address" TEXT /* Player's address for compliance and marketing */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Player's phone number for communication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the player is active */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Unique code for referral programs */,
  "referral_count" INTEGER /* Number of players referred by this player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the session (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "wager_amount" REAL /* Total amount wagered during the session */,
  "net_win" REAL /* Net win or loss for the session */,
  "is_bonus_session" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the session was a bonus session */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location from which the session was played (e.g., IP address or device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the promotion */,
  "promotion_details" TEXT /* Details about the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., deposit bonus, free spins) */,
  "promotion_value" TEXT /* Value of the promotion (e.g., 20%, 50 free spins) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the promotion is active */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the promotion has been used */,
  "max_usage_count" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the promotion can be used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., spin, bet) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  "action_value" REAL /* Value associated with the action (e.g., amount bet, number of spins) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the action (e.g., win, loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_actions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_method" TEXT /* Method of transaction (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "is_refundable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the transaction is refundable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
